Who We Are
About ASHVIX
Built for India.
Built to Last.
ASHVIX is a smart home automation brand focused on one thing — reliability. We build systems that work whether your internet is stable or not, making smart living accessible to every Indian household, shop, and workspace.
100%
Offline Capable

India
Designed & Built
What We Offer
Why ASHVIX?
Works Offline
No internet? No problem. ASHVIX creates its own local hotspot so your appliances stay in control — always.
Easy Setup
Retrofit into existing switchboards in minutes. No rewiring, no electrician, no complex configuration.
Affordable
Smart home automation priced for real India — middle-class households, hostels, shops, and small offices.
App Controlled
Custom Android app gives you full control of lights and fans — speed, on/off, schedules — from your phone.
Safe & Reliable
Fuse protection, surge suppression, optocoupler isolation, and fire-retardant enclosure — safety first.
Local First
No cloud dependency. Your data, your network, your control. Works on local WiFi without external servers.
Simple Process
How It Works
01
Install Module
Fit the ASHVIX module into your existing switchboard — no rewiring needed.
02
Connect App
Download the ASHVIX app and connect to your home WiFi or the device hotspot.
03
Control Everything
Control lights, fans, and more — online or offline, anytime.
